title: Summarize Progress and Next Steps
description: Produce a handoff-ready status of an in-flight task.
content:
Summarize the current state of this work: {{work}}

Produce a handoff a fresh agent (or future me) could pick up cold: what's done and verified, what's in progress, what's left, the key decisions made and why, and the immediate next action. Note any landmine — a thing that looks done but isn't, or a constraint that isn't obvious from the code. Keep it tight and factual.
